name: Fiction
description: A literary genre that includes imaginary events and people.

name: Classic Literature
description: Literary works that have stood the test of time and are recognized for their outstanding qualities.

name: Modern Classics
description: Books that have achieved critical acclaim and popularity in the contemporary era.

name: Contemporary Fiction
description: Fictional works that reflect current themes, society, and culture.

name: Poetry
description: A genre of literature that uses aesthetic and rhythmic qualities of language to evoke meanings.
